title: Hegemonikron Sources Configuration
description: User-side configuration that maps canonical metrics to data-source adapters. Lives at ~/.config/hegemonikron/sources.yaml or similar; this is environment-specific and never committed to a public catalog.

default_adapter.description: Adapter used for any metric not explicitly routed elsewhere.

adapters.description: Map of adapter name -> configuration for that adapter instance.

metrics.description: Optional whitelist: which canonical metrics this adapter instance should fulfill. If absent, the adapter handles every metric it natively supports.

endpoint.description: Adapter-specific endpoint URL (HTTP for InfluxDB, file path for CSV, etc.).

auth_env.description: Name of environment variable holding the auth token. Never the literal token.

config.description: Adapter-specific configuration (bucket, org, query templates, file paths, etc.). See adapters/<name>.md.

metric_overrides.description: Per-metric routing overrides. Use sparingly — prefer adapter-level metric whitelists.

adapter.description: Adapter name to use for this specific metric.
